name: Healthcare
description: Models for healthcare delivery including hospitals, clinics, specialty care, and related medical operations.

name: Diagnostic Laboratory
description: Clinical laboratory operations including pathology, hematology, chemistry, microbiology, and molecular diagnostics. Non-canonical sub-domain of Healthcare.

name: Digital Pathology
description: Workflows involving whole-slide imaging, digital scanner operations, AI-assisted diagnosis, and electronic pathology reporting. Non-canonical sub-sub-domain of Healthcare, nested under Diagnostic Laboratory.

name: Service Operations
description: Cross-cutting domain for service-oriented queueing and resource-contention models that serve customers through finite-capacity resources, independent of a specific industry. Non-canonical cross-cutting theme.
